Dove Hair Care Shampoo Anti Frizz Formula with Coconut Oil Argan Oil Almond Oil

Dove hair care to the rescue! Dove Anti Frizz Nourishing shampoo has been formulated for dry, unmanageable, and frizzy hair. The shampoo deeply nourishes and moisturizes locks and tresses from the very first wash, giving you great manageability, softness, and better overall frizz control.

Key Features

  • ANTI FRIZZ HAIR CARE: Dove Anti Frizz Nourishing shampoo was formulated for dry, unmanageable and frizzy hair; the shampoo deeply nourishes and moisturizes locks and tresses from the very first wash, giving you great manageability, softness and better overall frizz control; suitable for all hair types but especially great for dry, damaged, rough and curly hair
  • COCONUT OIL: Dove’s anti-frizz shampoo hair care formula features coconut oil as one of the key ingredients, a natural remedy to provide nourishment to your strands and also to the scalp as well, it prevents breakage and helps to fight against dryness
  • ARGAN OIL & ALMOND OIL: Also featured in this anti frizz hair care shampoo from Dove is argan oil that will help to moisturize dry and damaged hair; Argan oil is also rich in vitamin E, which provides a fatty layer to your hair and scalp that may help prevent dryness and can help reduce fizziness and boost shine; almond oil works to make hair stronger and less prone to split ends, while also providing moisture to the hair and scalp too
  • SAFE FOR DAILY SHAMPOOING: The non-greasy shampoo formula treats damaged hair without leaving leftover residue behind; the anti-frizz shampooing formula from Dove is safe for regular, daily use and is also safe to use on color-treated hair as well, providing progressive nourishment over time for healthier looking and feeling hair
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Brand: Dove; Weight: .9lbs; Volume: 350mL or 11.83 fluid ounces; Bottle: 100% recycled material

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DOVANTIFRZ1
  • UPC: 750630014501
  • Color: White
  • Size: Standard Size

This Dove shampoo features three key ingredients to help replenish hair:

COCONUT OIL: Dove’s anti-frizz shampoo hair care formula features coconut oil as one of the key ingredients, a natural remedy to provide nourishment to your strands and also to the scalp as well, it prevents breakage and helps to fight against dryness ARGAN OIL & ALMOND OIL: The daily use, non-greasy shampoo formula is safe for use on color-treated hair and designed to smooth the hair cuticle and calms frizz for silkier, more manageable strands. As well as instantly eliminating frizz, Dove Anti-Frizz Shampoo also works over time to provide long-term results, progressively nourishing hair so that it gets healthier and stronger, wash after wash.

Apply the Dove anti-frizz shampoo to wet hair, lather, and rinse well.
